# VisuallyHidden

A utility component that hides content visually while keeping it accessible to screen readers. Essential for providing context to assistive technologies without affecting the visual layout.

## Import

```jsx
import { VisuallyHidden } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `children` | `ReactNode` | - | The content to hide visually but keep accessible. |

## Usage

### Hidden Label for Screen Readers

```jsx
<Button>
  <LuSearch />
  <VisuallyHidden>Search</VisuallyHidden>
</Button>
```

### Accessible Form Label

```jsx
<VisuallyHidden>
  <label htmlFor="search-input">Search</label>
</VisuallyHidden>
<Input id="search-input" placeholder="Search..." />
```

### Hidden Heading for Page Structure

```jsx
<VisuallyHidden>
  <h1>Dashboard Overview</h1>
</VisuallyHidden>
```
